spec.expr: sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}/kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)

label_join(
  (
    (
      sum(kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
      -
      sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
    )
    /
    sum(
      deriv(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}[$__rate_interval])
    ) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
  ) > 0,
  "nodepersistentvolumeclaim",
  ":",
  "node", "persistentvolumeclaim"
)

rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{
    namespace=~"$namespace",
    pod=~"$component.*",
    pod=~"$pod",
    container=~"$container",
    image!="registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
    id=~".*.scope",
    pod!="",
    container!=""
  }[$__rate_interval])
/

    namespace=~"$namespace",
    pod=~"$component.*",
    pod=~"$pod",
    container=~"$container",

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

spec.title: average of last request time (status - method - route)

spec.expr:
label_join(
    label_join(
        sum_over_time(
            sum by (route, status, method) (
              clamp_min(
                nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}
                - on(route, status, method, pod)
                (nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"} offset 15s)
              , 0)
            )[30s:15s]
        )
        /
        on() group_left()
        sum_over_time(
            sum by () (
              clamp_min(
                nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}
                - on(route, status, method, pod)
                (nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"} offset 15s)
              , 0)
            )[30s:15s]
        )
        and (avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0),
    "statusroute", ":", "status", "route"
    ),
  "statusroutemethod", ":", "statusroute", "method"
) > 0

avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

spec.title: average of last response size (status - method - route)

spec.description:
How many active connections are actually doing work?

0–5% → mostly idle traffic / keepalive

5–30% → healthy traffic

30–70% → heavy utilization

above 70% sustained → pod may be overloaded or upstream slow

100% → suspicious, saturation risk

This tells you whether nginx is spending time serving traffic vs idle keepalive.
spec.title: busy connection ratio

spec.expr: sum(nginx_http_connections{state="writing", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod"}) by (pod) / sum(nginx_http_connections{state="active", namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$component.*", pod=~"$pod"}) by (pod)

spec.description: High ratio means nginx is busy sending responses — useful for spotting slow clients or large payloads.
spec.title: writing / active ratio (response concurrency)

spec.expr:
sum_over_time(
  clamp_min(
    sum by (host, status,method) (
      nginx_ingress_controller_requests{
        exported_namespace="$namespace",
        status=~"$status",
        host=~"$host",
        status=~"2.*"
      }
    )
    -
    sum by (host, status,method) (
      nginx_ingress_controller_requests{
        exported_namespace="$namespace",
        status=~"$status",
        host=~"$host",
        status=~"2.*"
      } offset 15s
    )
  , 0)

spec.description: All child processes of a pod has experienced this memory usage on average.
spec.title: Average Child Process Memory Usage

spec.expr:
label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_requests{
        resource="cpu",
        unit="core",
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        pod!="",
        container!=""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node)
  and (
    avg(
        sum(
            rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{
                namespace=~"$namespace",
                pod=~"$component.*",
                pod=~"$pod",
                container=~"$container",
                image!="registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
                id=~".*.scope",
                pod!="",
                container!=""
            }[$__rate_interval])
        ) by (pod, container, namespace, node)
      )
      by (pod, container, namespace, node) > 0),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    container_memory_working_set_bytes{
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      image!="registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
      id=~".*.scope",
      pod!="",
      container!=""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

spec.definition: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
spec.label: Component
spec.name: component

spec.query: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
